case_title: JOHN C. O'NEILL VS. PEI ASSET POOL V LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY O'NEILL, JOHN C. AS TO DEFENDANT PEI ASSET POOL V LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. CAROLYN MICHAELS APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'NEILL, JOHN C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEI ASSET POOL V LLC $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,350.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEI ASSET POOL V LLC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PEI ASSET POOL V LLC
